interface_specification_complete.evidence: module-design.md contains complete interface contracts: DEBATE_CONTEXT input format for Creator/Critic/Refiner (Contract 1), critique report output format (Contract 2), updated artifact format (Contract 3), debate-summary.md format (Contract 4). All 4 cross-module contracts fully specified with parsing rules and invariants.

all_modules_designed.evidence: module-design.md contains 5 module designs (M1: Orchestrator DEBATE_ROUTING extension, M2: Design Critic agent, M3: Design Refiner agent, M4: System Designer Creator awareness, M5: isdlc.md update). Each module has exact section structure, input/output contracts, and validation rules.

ui_wireframes_exist.evidence: This is a prompt-engineering feature (markdown agent files). No UI components exist. No wireframes required.

user_flows_documented.evidence: data-flow-design.md contains 5 mermaid diagrams: (1) Phase 04 debate loop sequence (happy path), (2) missing critical artifact flow, (3) malformed critique flow, (4) unconverged debate flow, (5) non-REST interface adaptation flow, plus debate-OFF single-agent path.

error_taxonomy_complete.evidence: error-taxonomy.md defines 24 error codes across 7 categories: DRE (3), CRE (4), CKE (5), RFE (5), CVE (2), STE (3), ITE (2). All 4 error response patterns documented (fail-open, abort-fallback, unconverged-continuation, tolerate-and-continue).

validation_rules_defined.evidence: validation-rules.json defines 64 validation rules across 5 modules (M1: 10, M2: 28, M3: 17, M4: 6, M5: 3). All 7 FRs, 4 NFRs, and 34 ACs traced.

designs_cover_all_requirements.evidence: Traceability summary in module-design.md confirms 7/7 FRs and 34/34 ACs covered. FR-001 (8 ACs) -> M2. FR-002 (9 ACs) -> M3. FR-003 (4 ACs) -> M1+M5. FR-004 (2 ACs) -> M4. FR-005 (3 ACs) -> M2+orchestrator. FR-006 (5 ACs) -> M2. FR-007 (4 ACs) -> edge cases.

interface_contracts_reviewed.evidence: module-design.md Cross-Module Interface Contracts section defines 4 contracts with exact formats, parsing rules, and invariants. All follow the same patterns established in REQ-0015.

Article_I_Specification_Primacy.evidence: All module designs trace to specific FRs and ACs from requirements-spec.md. Traceability summary shows 7/7 FRs and 34/34 ACs covered. No orphan designs exist.

Article_IV_Explicit_Over_Implicit.evidence: All design decisions documented explicitly. No [UNKNOWN] markers remain. Module designs specify exact section structure, input/output formats, and validation rules. Edge cases documented with specific handling for 4 AC-007 conditions.

Article_V_Simplicity_First.evidence: Design extends existing DEBATE_ROUTING table (1 row addition). Zero new runtime code, hooks, or dependencies. 2 new agent files follow existing template. 3 modified files have minimal changes. Simplest possible approach per ADR-0001.

Article_VII_Artifact_Traceability.evidence: Every module design includes Traces field linking to specific FRs and ACs. Validation rules include traces arrays. Error taxonomy includes traces. data-flow-design.md references FR/AC IDs.

Article_IX_Quality_Gate_Integrity.evidence: All required Phase 04 artifacts produced: module-design.md, error-taxonomy.md, validation-rules.json, data-flow-design.md. Gate-04 validation checklist passes all applicable items.
